## What this PR does

<!-- 1-2 sentences: which department, which task(s), what's added / changed / removed. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick one. -->

- [ ] New entry added to an existing task
- [ ] New task added to an existing department
- [ ] New department added
- [ ] Entry updated (link, description, metadata)
- [ ] Entry removed
- [ ] Format / typo / structural fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the [format spec](../CONTRIBUTING.md#entry-line-format) — plain `[Name](url)`, NOT bold; trailing metadata in italics
- [ ] Type, Setup, Pricing, Platforms use values from the [closed dictionaries](../CONTRIBUTING.md#closed-dictionaries)
- [ ] Catalog URL points to `elasticflow.app/hub/...`; Source URL points to the GitHub repo (or marked `_(closed source)_`)
- [ ] Description is one sentence ending in a period
- [ ] Entries alphabetical within task; tasks alphabetical in `## Contents`
- [ ] If adding a task: Quick path by role updated to include it
- [ ] No [anti-patterns](../CONTRIBUTING.md#what-not-to-include) — no unsourced stats, promotional hero copy, duplicated per-department index blocks, or per-task role blockquotes
- [ ] All anchors render in GitHub Preview

## Source verification

- [ ] Catalog URL resolves and shows the entry
- [ ] Source URL resolves to a public GitHub repo (or the entry is marked closed-source)
- [ ] Publisher is correctly named (matches catalog publisher record)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know — context for the entry, why it's in this task vs another, edge cases handled. Optional. -->
